findings.description: The class name 'CsrfTokenVerificationHandler' appears in the hints but is never explicitly stated in the source Excel content. It is only derivable from the reference URL path ('csrf_token_verification_handler.html'). The source document does not name the class directly.
findings.source_evidence: Source URL: https://nablarch.github.io/docs/5u17/doc/application_framework/application_framework/handlers/web/csrf_token_verification_handler.html — the class name itself does not appear as text in the xlsx content.
